name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Phase 1 of the research-portal merge (read side, no email). Ports the weekly-report pipeline into the app behind Engagement auth: manager+ admin report list/detail, PDF upload -> Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) parse -> manual editor, the public editorial report pages + archive at /research, and Puppeteer + Sparticuz Chromium PDF rendering (LD_LIBRARY_PATH / AWS_LAMBDA_JS_RUNTIME / setGraphicsMode fixes carried over). Down-ported Next 16 -> 14 and Tailwind v4 -> v3; editorial fonts load only inside the research route group. No schema changes (v1.8 landed it); no cron added (scheduled send is Phase 2). Adds runtime deps: @anthropic-ai/sdk, @sparticuz/chromium, puppeteer-core, zod, lucide-react.
